title: hieracium murorum subsp. subprotractifolium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subprotractifolium is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, specifically a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum. It is also known as Rock Hawkweed, a flowering plant with medicinal properties. Hieracium murorum subsp. subprotractifolium has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
